title: Velvety Adventurous Venezuelan Refried Beans Stir-fry
description: A unique take on traditional refried beans, infused with earthy flavors and a vegan twist that's perfect for an adventurous meal.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Fold in cumin seeds and paprika powder, cooking for 1 minute more to toast the spices.
Add the garbanzo beans to the pan along with tomato sauce. Stir well.
Bring mixture to a simmer and let it cook undisturbed for about 5 minutes until slightly thickened.
Season with salt to taste, stir again, then turn off heat.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro if using, serve hot.
